page_metadata.bioconda__summary: GCTA (Genome-wide Complex Trait Analysis) estimates the proportion of phenotypic variance explained by all genome-wide SNPs for complex traits.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for genome-wide complex trait analysis
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genome-wide Complex Trait Analysis. Estimate the proportion of phenotypic variance explained by genome- or chromosome-wide SNPs for complex traits (the GREML method), and has subsequently extended for many other analyses to better understand the genetic architecture of complex traits.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genome-wide Complex Trait Analysis. Estimate the proportion of phenotypic variance explained by genome- or chromosome-wide SNPs for complex traits (the GREML method), and has subsequently extended for many other analyses to better understand the genetic architecture of complex traits.
